Yi kina
Mai binciken ku baya goyan bayan WebAudio.

engines.bassoonDesc: Yana goyan da .xm / .mod kawai. Idan ba haka ba, sai ya koma Chiptune3 sannan FFmpeg don sauran nau'ikan.
engines.ffmpegDesc: Yana canza duk nau'ikan sauti zuwa MP3. Mafi girman tallafi, jinkirin farawa.
engines.chiptune3Desc: Yana goyan bayar da nau'ikan tracker sama da 20 (.xm/.mod/.it/.s3m/.mptm/.umx …). Idan ba a iya ba, sai a yi amfani da FFmpeg don sauran nau'ikan.

settings.title: Saitoci
settings.engineDesc: Zaɓi wane injin sauti za a yi amfani da shi. Ana ba da shawarar Chiptune3 don mafi kyawun tallafin tsarin tracker.

intro.tutorialTitle: Yadda Ake Amfani da Mai Kunna Tracker
intro.introWelcome: Ƙofar shiga don jin daɗin kiɗan tracker a cikin tsari sama da 68 — daga MOD da XM na almara zuwa MPTM da UMX na zamani — ana amfani da tarin manyan abubuwa a
intro.tutorialStep5Title: 5. Asusu, Abubuwan da Aka Fi So & Tarihi
intro.tutorialStep3Title: 3. Ganin Rayuwa — Duban Tsari da Oscilloscopes
intro.tutorialClosing: Saurara mai daɗi — kuma ka ji daɗin kiɗan!
intro.tutorialStep5Body: Ƙirƙiri asusu kyauta don buɗe ƙarin fasaloli:
intro.tutorialStep3Body: Tracker Player yana kawo waƙa zuwa rayuwa tare da nunin gani na lokaci guda guda biyu masu jituwa:
intro.tutorialLead: Wannan jagorar tana jagorantar ku ta kowane fasalin Tracker Player, daga neman waƙarku ta farko zuwa keɓance mai kunna don aikin ku.
intro.introWelcomeNote: Tracker Player ya fiye da kawai mai kunna kiɗa — cikakken dandamali ne na kiɗan tracker tare da kyakkyawar fuska mai amsawa, nunin tsarin lokaci na gaske, oscilloscopes na tashoshi, da tarin kayan aikin da aka tsara don sauƙaƙe gano da jin daɗin kiɗan tracker a kowace na'ura.
intro.tutorialStep4Body: Tracker Player yana da matuƙar iya canzawa. Samun damar saituna ta hanyar gunkin gear (saman layi) ko kunnen Saituna (gefen hagu):
intro.tutorialStep2Body: Danna kowane waƙa a cikin jerin waƙoƙi don fara kunna. Mai kunna yana ɗauka nan take — yawancin fayiloli suna fara kunna cikin ƙasa da daƙiƙa ɗaya. Yayin da waƙa ke kunna, za ka ga:
intro.tutorialStep1Body: Waƙar waƙa ita ce zuciyar Mai Kunna Tracker. Yi amfani da mashin bincike a saman don nemo waƙoƙi ta sunan fayil ko take. A ƙarƙashin mashin bincike, za ku sami tarin matattara masu ƙarfi:
intro.tutorialStep6Tip: Shawara mai kyau: A waya, ƙara Tracker Player zuwa allon gidanka don samun gogewa kamar na app na asali. Yana aiki sosai azaman Progressive Web App tare da adana bayanai ba tare da intanet ba.
intro.introWhatBody1: Tracker Player wani aiki ne na sirri mai buɗe tushe wanda aka keɓe don kawo kyawun kiɗan tracker a cikin burauza na zamani. Ba sabon injin sauti ba ne, amma haɗin kai mai zurfi da ci gaba na biyu da aka gina a kan manyan ayyukan buɗe tushe da suka wanzu, yana ƙirƙirar cikakken tsarin gogewar mai amfani.
intro.introTrackerBody3: Har wa yau, kiɗan tracker yana ci gaba da bunƙasa a cikin al'ummar demoscene ta duniya da kuma tsakanin masu sha'awar kwamfuta na retro. Tracker Player yana fatan gabatar da mutane da yawa ga wannan nau'in fasaha na musamman wanda ke ɗauke da tarihin kiɗan kwamfuta, ta hanyar mu'amala ta zamani da sauƙin hulɗa.
intro.introWhatBody2Tail: , mai na'urar bin diddigin Amiga MOD/XM da aka gina a cikin JavaScript kawai ta Steffest, wanda ke sake haifar da ainihin kwarewar sauraron tracker. A kan wannan tushe, aikin ya haɗa Chiptune3 (injini na WebAssembly na musamman wanda ya dogara da libopenmpt) da kuma canza tsarin FFmpeg a gefen uwar garken, yana faɗaɗa tallafin tsari daga MOD/XM na asali zuwa fiye da tsari 68.
intro.introWhatBody3: Daga binciken waƙa da tacewa, nuna hoton sauti, tsarin asusun mai amfani zuwa tallafin harsuna daban-daban, Tracker Player ya gina cikakken tsarin abubuwan da ke kewaye da ainihin mai kunna, da nufin baiwa masu amfani damar jin daɗin sha'awar kiɗan tracker ba tare da wani ilimin fasaha ba.
intro.changelogIntro: Tracker Player ya samo cigaba sosai daga asalinsa a matsayin mai kunna MOD/XM mai sauƙi. Ga jerin manyan abubuwan da suka faru:
intro.tutorialStep6Body: Kowane waƙa a cikin Mai Kunna Tracker tana da madauki na dindindin, wanda za a iya rabawa. Kwafi hanyar haɗin daga mashigin adireshi na burauzar ka yayin da waƙa ke kunna — zai yi kama da /song/123456/filename.mod. Aika wa abokai, sanya shi a shafukan sada zumunta, ko adana shi don amfani daga baya. Hanyar haɗin za ta buɗe waƙa ɗaya koyaushe.
intro.introTrackerBody1: Kiɗan tracker (wanda kuma ake kira kiɗan module ko kiɗan MOD) wani nau'i ne na musamman na kiɗan dijital wanda ya fito a ƙarshen shekarun 1980 akan Commodore Amiga. Ba kamar MP3 ko sautin yawo ba, fayilolin tracker suna ƙunshe da makin kiɗa (bayanin kida, tsari, tasiri) da samfuran kayan kida — kamar fayil ɗin aikin kiɗa mai zaman kansa. Wannan yana sa fayilolin tracker su zama ƙanana sosai yayin da suke ba da damar rikitarwa na kiɗa mai ban mamaki.
intro.creditsNuxtDesc: Tsarin Vue.js mai ƙarfi wanda ke tafiyar da dukkan gabanmu da bayanmu. Nuxt yana ba da sabis na nuna shafuka daga uwar garken don saurin loda shafuka da SEO, uwar garken Nitro don hanyoyin API, haɗin SQLite database, da kuma raba lambobi ta atomatik don ingantaccen aiki.
intro.creditsEmscriptenDesc: LLVM tushen kayan aikin tara da ke tara lambar C/C++ zuwa WebAssembly. Muna amfani da Emscripten don tara libopenmpt ɗinmu da aka gyara — gami da na'urar sarrafa igiyar ruwa ta musamman — zuwa kundin WASM mai fayil guda wanda ke aiki da saurin kusan na asali a cikin AudioWorklet na burauza.
intro.creditsVueDesc: Tsarin JavaScript na ci gaba da ake amfani da shi don mu'amalar mu ta tushen sassa. Vue's Composition API, tsarin sake kunnawa, da sassa na fayil guda sun sa ya yiwu a gina da kuma kula da mu'amalar mai kunna rikodi mai rikitarwa tare da tsaftataccen lamba mai sassa.
intro.creditsModArchiveDesc: Babban ma'ajiyar waƙoƙi na intanet, wanda ke ɗauke da fiye da 150,000 na modul daga dubban mawaƙa a cikin shekaru arba'in. Mod Archive shine tushen kaɗai na kiɗan a cikin ɗakin karatunmu kuma cibiya mara maye ga al'ummar tracking.
intro.creditsWebGLDesc: API ɗin zanen gidan yanar gizo da ke nuna yanayin tsarin mu na gano lokaci na ainihi. Bayanan bayanin kula na tsarin ana watsa su zuwa zanen WebGL a 60 fps, suna sake nuna kamannin kula mai gudana na masu gyara tsarin gargajiya kamar ProTracker da FastTracker II.
intro.creditsTailwindDesc: Tsarin CSS mai amfani da farko da ake amfani da shi don yin salo. Tsarin alamar ƙira na Tailwind yana ba da damar gine-ginen jigogi 16 ɗinmu — kowane launi, inuwa, da iyaka suna daidaitawa da jigon aiki ta hanyar kaddarorin al'ada na CSS waɗanda aka samar daga tsarin Tailwind ɗinmu.
intro.creditsIntro: Tracker Player an gina a kan gwiwar hannun wani babban tsarin buɗaɗɗen tushe mai ban mamaki. Dukan ɗakin karatun waƙoƙinmu na 135,400+ an samo shi daga The Mod Archive — babban ma'ajiyar waƙoƙin tracker a intanet. Muna godiya sosai ga kowane mai ba da gudummawa wanda aikinsa ya sa wannan aikin ya yiwu.
intro.creditsAudioWorkletDesc: Ƙayyadaddun ƙa'idar W3C Web Audio API wanda ke ba da damar sarrafa sauti mara jinkiri, mara tsangwama a kan wani keɓaɓɓen zaren lokaci na gaske. AudioWorklet shine inda injin Chiptune3 ɗinmu ke gudanar da libopenmpt WASM da aka haɗa, ba tare da dogaro da babban zaren UI ba, yana tabbatar da sake kunnawa mai santsi ko da menene aikin fuskar mu'amala.
intro.creditsBassoonDesc: Ƙirƙiri ta Steffest. Sake aiwatarwa na gaskiya na tushen burauza na na'urorin waƙoƙin Amiga MOD da XM na gargajiya — ProTracker da FastTracker II — wanda aka rubuta gaba ɗaya a cikin JavaScript. BassoonTracker yana ba da sake kunna sauti na gaskiya mai dumi wanda ya fara wannan aikin, tare da cikakken goyon baya ga MODs na tashoshi 4 na gargajiya da XMs na tashoshi da yawa waɗanda suka haɗa da envelopes, filters, da effects.
intro.introTrackerBody2: An fasal ɗin ya fara ne daga Karsten Obarski's Ultimate Soundtracker a shekarar 1987, kuma ya ci gaba da haɓaka cikin sauri ta hanyar demoscene — wani yanki na al'ada mai ƙarfi inda masu shirye-shirye, mawaƙa, da masu fasaha ke gasa don ƙirƙirar ayyukan gani da sauti masu ban sha'awa. A cikin shekaru da yawa, nau'ikan tracker da yawa sun fito, kowannensu yana tura iyakokin abin da zai yiwu: ƙarin tashoshi, mafi kyawun tasiri, kayan kida da aka ƙirƙira, tallafin VST plugin, har ma da cikakkiyar damar haɗawa. A yau, yanayin tracker yana ci gaba da aiki a duk duniya, tare da sabbin waƙoƙi da ake fitarwa kowace rana a shafuka kamar The Mod Archive.
intro.creditsLibopenmptDesc: Haɓaka ta hanyar masu ba da gudummawa na OpenMPT. Laburaren sake kunnawa na tushen buɗe ido, yana goyan bayan nau'ikan tsarin 68+ tare da daidaito mara misaltuwa. Mun gyara lambar tushen C na libopenmpt — muna ƙara wani waveform_processor na al'ada wanda ke ɗaukar bayanan PCM ta kowane tashoshi a cikin mahaɗar kafin fitarwa ta ƙarshe — kuma mun haɗa shi zuwa WebAssembly ta hanyar Emscripten. Ginin WASM ɗin mu da aka gyara ya maye gurbin ginin da aka riga aka haɗa wanda aka haɗa tare da Chiptune3, yana ba da damar oscilloscopes na kowane tashoshi kuma yana samar da tushen yanke hukunci don duk nau'ikan 68+.
intro.creditsChiptune3Desc: An DrSnuggles ne ya kirkiro — wani ɗakin karatu na JavaScript mai buɗe tushe wanda ke kunshe da libopenmpt a cikin AudioWorklet don sake kunna nau'ikan tracker sama da 68 a cikin burauza. Don wannan aikin, mun keɓance mai sarrafa AudioWorklet don cire bayanan igiyar ruwa ta kowane tashoshi (wanda ke ba da ikon oscilloscopes masu tashoshi da yawa), mun ƙara sarrafa ƙarfin sauti ta atomatik, da kuma ƙarfafa sarrafa yanayin gudu don saurin sauya waƙoƙi. Chiptune3 shine gadar da ke tsakanin Web Audio API na burauza da ikon ɓoye bayanan ginin libopenmpt ɗinmu da aka gyara, kuma shine injin da muke ba da shawarar a matsayin tsoho.
tutorialStep1Filters: Tace Fitar — Danna don buɗe grid zaɓi da yawa na duk nau'ikan da ake da su. Yi amfani da maɓallan saiti don zaɓar ƙungiyoyi cikin sauri: Bassoon (MOD/XM), Major Tracker (MOD/XM/IT/S3M/MPTM), Chiptune3 Duka (nau'ikan 56), ko Duk Abubuwan da Ake Taimakawa.
Tacewar Tashin Tashin — Rage ta hanyar ƙididdigar tashoshi: tashoshi 4 (zamanin MOD na gargajiya), tashoshi 8, ko tashoshi 8+ (multitrack na zamani).
Tacewa Girma — Tacewa ta girman fayil: ƙarami (<100KB), matsakaici, ko babba (>1MB).
Tace na Mai Bincike — Rubuta sunan mai bincike (misali, "Impulse Tracker", "FastTracker") don nemo kiɗan da aka yi da takamaiman software.
Zaɓuɓɓukan Tsarawa — Tsara jerin waƙoƙi ta ID, take, sunan fayil, girman, ko kwanan wata gyara, a cikin tsari na hawa ko sauka.
Maiɓincin Tushe — Canja tsakanin Duk waƙoƙi, Waɗanda kuka fi so, da Tarihin Kunna ku.
tutorialStep2Details: Bayanin Waƙa — Suna, mawaƙi, tsari, adadin tashoshi, da lambar waƙa da aka nuna a saman abubuwan sarrafa mai kunna.
Kunnawa/Kashe & Kewayawa — Babban maɓallin kunnawa/kashe tare da zaɓin yanayin sake kunnawa: Rarraba (bazuwar), A Jere (jeri), Sake Kunna Ɗaya, ko Tsaya Bayan Na Yanzu.
Waƙa ta gaba — Tsallaka zuwa waƙa ta gaba da hannu, ko bari yanayin sake kunnawa da ka zaɓa ya sarrafa ta.
Ƙararrawa & Ci gaba — Daidaita ƙararrawa tare da ma'aunin zamewa, bincika cikin waƙar, kuma ga lokacin da ya wuce/ya rage.
Maɓallin So — Danna zuciya don ƙara waƙa zuwa abubuwan da kuka fi so (yana buƙatar asusu).
Zazzagewa — Ajiye ainihin fayil ɗin tracker zuwa na'urarka.
Haɗin ModArchive — Buɗe shafin waƙar akan The Mod Archive don ƙarin bayani da sharhin al'umma.

Bayanin Waƙa — Duba cikakken metadata: sunan tracker, kwanan wata, tsawon lokaci, nau'in kwantena, waƙoƙin ƙarƙashinsa, adadin tashoshi, kayan kida, samfura, umarni, tsari, da duk wani saƙon da mawaƙi ya saka.
tutorialStep3Details: Duban Tsari — Duba ainihin bayanan tsarin tracker yayin da suke gudana a ainihin lokaci, an yi su ta WebGL don aiki mai laushi. Kowane shafi yana wakiltar tashar, kowane layi shine abin bayanin kula. Bayanan kula, kayan kida, ƙararrawa, da umarnin tasiri duk ana nuna su — kamar yadda yake a cikin editan tracker na gargajiya. Danna maɓallin canza tsarin don musanya tsakanin shimfidar tsaye (na gargajiya) da kwance (mai faɗin allo).

Na'urar Oscilloscope na Kowane Tashar — A ƙasa da mai kunna, za ka ga grid na nunin igiyoyin sauti — ɗaya ga kowace tashar sauti a cikin waƙar. Waɗannan suna aiki ta hanyar mai sarrafa igiyoyin sauti na matakin C na mu wanda aka gina a cikin libopenmpt, wanda ke fitar da sautin kowace tasha kafin haɗawa na ƙarshe. Kalli igiyar sauti ta kowace tasha tana gudana a ainihin lokaci, yana ba ka hoton yadda aka gina kiɗan — bugun ganga a tasha 1, bass a tasha 2, jagora a tasha 3, da sauransu.
Duk da haka ana iya kunna/kashe abubuwan gani biyu a cikin Saituna don ingantaccen aiki ko zaɓi.
tutorialStep4Settings: Injin Sakewa — Zaɓi tsakanin BassoonTracker (classic MOD/XM), Chiptune3 (tavsiya, fiye da tsari 20), ko FFmpeg (mafi girman tallafin tsari ta hanyar canza a gefen uwar garken).

Jigo — Zaɓi daga jigogi 16 masu launi. Jigogi masu haske sun haɗa da Haske, Retro (Solarized), Ocean (Teal), Forest (Green), Strawberry (Pink), Blue, Pink, Cyan, Orange, da Gray. Jigogi masu duhu sun haɗa da Duhu, Midnight (Deep Purple), Golden (Black & Gold), Purple, Red, da Green.
Harshe — Harsunan mu'amala 52. An adana zaɓinka a gida.
Ƙararrawa — Saita matakin ƙararrawa na tsoho kuma zaɓi tilasta shi akan kowace waƙa.
Daidaita Sauti Mai Girma — Daidaita ƙarar sake kunnawa ta atomatik don sauraro mai daidaito (yana kunne ta tsohuwa).
Matsakaicin Adadin Zagaye — Waƙoƙin Tracker galibi suna zagaye har abada. Saita matsakaicin adadin zagaye don hana sake kunnawa mara iyaka (tsoho: 1).
Maɓallin Nuni — Nuna ko ɓoye hangen nesa, kallon tsari, da sashin gabatarwa.
tutorialStep5Details: Fiyori — Zuciyar kowace waƙa don adana ta cikin jerin fiyorinku, wanda ake iya samu daga mai zaɓin tushen waƙa.
Tarihin Kunna — Kowane waƙar da kake kunna ana rubuta ta ta atomatik. Bincika tarihinka don sake gano waƙoƙi.
Haɗa Na'urori Daban-daban — Abubuwan da kuka fi so da tarihin ku suna bin ku a kan na'urori daban-daban idan kun shiga.
Sirri — Asusar ɗin ku yana adana abubuwan da kuka fi so da tarihin aiki kawai. Babu wani bayanan sirri da ake tattarawa ko rabawa.

items: Integrated libopenmpt as a third playback engine, supporting 68+ tracker formats with bit-accurate playback.
Developed custom waveform_processor in C — modifications to libopenmpt's source code enabling per-channel audio extraction before final mixing.
Compiled libopenmpt + waveform_processor to WebAssembly via Emscripten for in-browser execution.
Built WebGL-based pattern view with both vertical (traditional tracker) and horizontal (widescreen) display modes.
Added per-channel oscilloscope visualization — live scrolling waveforms for each audio channel, powered by the custom waveform processor.
Created adaptive font sizing and pixel-perfect text rendering in WebGL visualizer.
Implemented hard clipping protection to prevent uint8 texture overflow in waveform visualizers.
Added multi-channel signal normalization and noise gating for cleaner oscilloscope displays.
Fixed timing drift in Chiptune3 AudioWorklet for rock-solid playback synchronization.
Expanded format support to 56 formats in Chiptune3 + additional formats in libopenmpt.
Added user account system with registration, login, and favorites/history sync.
Added track info modal with comprehensive metadata display.
Added download modal — download original tracker files or convert to MP3.
Added horizontal layout mode for pattern display (transposed channel and row data).
Added theme-specific row highlight alpha variables for WebGL shader backgrounds.
Developed Chiptune3 — a custom WebAssembly audio engine supporting 20+ tracker formats with per-channel output.
Implemented AudioWorklet-based playback for low-latency, glitch-free audio.
Built dual-canvas oscilloscope system — spectrum analyzer (frequency domain) and waveform display (time domain).
Added WebGL rendering pipeline for high-performance visualizations.
Introduced 16 color themes with CSS custom properties and runtime switching.
Built the ear-bar sidebar (InfoDrawer) with 5 panels: Guide, Settings, Theme, Language, Account.
Added 52-language internationalization system with locale detection and fallback chains.
Implemented responsive mobile layout with safe-area support and collapsible navigation.
Added playlist search, format filter panel with preset buttons, and multi-field sort.
Built pagination controls with first/prev/-10/+10/next/last navigation.
Initial release as 'MOD Player' — a web-based player for MOD and XM tracker music.
Integrated BassoonTracker by Steffest as the core playback engine — browser-based Amiga tracker in JavaScript.
Built playlist interface with table view showing track number, title, and filename.
Added basic playback controls: play, pause, next, playback mode selection.
Created Settings panel with volume control, max loop setting, and display toggles.
Implemented local storage for user preferences (theme, language, settings).
Added introductory guide section explaining what tracker music is and how to use the player.
Sourced initial music library from CoolModFiles.com and The Mod Archive.
Designed the responsive layout foundation: header, player column, playlist column, footer.
Added dark and light theme support with CSS custom properties.

introFeatures: Laburaren fayilolin kiɗan tracker sama da 135,400 waɗanda suka ƙunshi sama da nau'ikan 68, daga MODs tashoshi 4 zuwa manyan tashoshi 256.
Tsarin injin sau uku: BassoonTracker (JS na gargajiya), Chiptune3 (AudioWorklet + libopenmpt WASM), da FFmpeg (canjin bayanai ta gefen uwar garken) — an zaɓa ta atomatik ga kowane fayil.
Duban tsarin bin diddigin lokaci na ainihi wanda aka yi shi a cikin WebGL — kalli bayanan kida yayin da suke gudana kamar yadda ake yi a cikin editan tracker na gargajiya.

Na'urar oscilloscope na tashar kowane tasha — duba fitar da sauti na kowane tasha a matsayin raƙuman igiyar ruwa mai gudana kai tsaye, wanda aka yi amfani da shi ta hanyar cire raƙuman igiyar ruwa na matakin C na musamman.
Zane da amsa wanda yake daidaita da kyau ga kowane allo: kwamfutar tebur, kwamfutar hannu, ko waya — gami da yanayin tsari a kwance don allo mai fadi.
Jigogi 16 na jigogi masu kyau da aka tsara — daga haske mai tsabta zuwa tsakar dare mai zurfi, solarized retro, zinariya mai dumi, da duk abin da ke tsakanin.
Harshen mu'amala 52 — yana sa waƙar tracker ta zama mai sauƙi ga masu sauraro a duniya.
Bincike mai ƙarfi, tace tsari mai zaɓi da yawa tare da maɓallan saiti (Bassoon, Major Tracker, Chiptune3, Duk Abubuwan da Ake Taimakawa), tace adadin tashoshi, da tsara filaye da yawa.
Tsarin asusu tare da abubuwan da aka fi so da tarihin kunnawa — daidaita ɗakin karatunka a duk na'urorinka.
Hanyoyin haɗin waƙa na dindindin da za a iya rabawa — kowace waƙa tana samun URL na musamman kamar /song/123456/filename.mod.
Zazzage ain fayilolin tracker ko canza su zuwa MP3 tare da dannawa guda ɗaya.
Filin bayanin waƙa yana nuna metadata: take, mawaƙi, mai bin diddigin, tsari, tashoshi, kayan aiki, samfura, umarni, alamu, da saƙon da aka haɗa.
Kyauta ce gaba ɗaya, buɗaɗɗen tushe, kuma al'umma ce ke jagoranta — babu tallace-tallace, babu bin diddigin, babu shingen biyan kuɗi.

trackInfo.title: Take
trackInfo.noMeta: Babu bayanin da ke akwai don wannan waƙa.

alerts.loginRequired: Da fatan ka shiga don son waƙoƙi.
alerts.favoritesFailed: An kasa sabunta abubuwan da aka fi so.
